title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Maruti Suzuki India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Maruti Suzuki India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Maruti Suzuki India in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Maruti Suzuki India:
Maruti Suzuki India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Maruti Suzuki India!
